name: Torin
archetype: Reaver, natural-born leader commanding through competence
speech_patterns: Issues clear commands without hesitation or doubt
Speaks in concise tactical language and action verbs
Acknowledges contributions and calls out excellent plays
quirks: Mentally catalogues every party member's strengths immediately
Repositions constantly to maintain situational awareness
Gives tactical feedback even when not group leader
example_phrases: Mage on the left, melee right. I'll pull. Focus fire priority targets. Execute.
Solid play on that interrupt. Saved the healer. Good awareness.
We're taking this too slow. Thirty seconds per pack, people. Tighten up.
Regroup at the pillar. Assess. Adapt. We don't repeat mistakes.
I've run this dungeon forty times. Trust the calls and we clear in twelve minutes.
